feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: FINT: DZ documents not picked for Interest calculation.
entry.content: In the transaction Code: FINT, the DZ documents against RV document are not picked the Interest calculation. Due to this various overdue interest is pending to post.

entry.title: How to Disable Enterprise Search for Specific Applications/Catalogs Only?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking for a way to disable enterprise search functionality in the shell bar of the Fiori Launchpad, but only for specific applications or catalogs.

So far we've managed to disable search globally via transaction /UI2/FLP_CUS_CONF by specifying SEARCH option as false

I also tried to disable it in a catalog via target mapping for application by using parameter "renderers/fiori2/componentData/config/enableSearch" as false, but this one did not work at all.

I was only able to disable it by creating a separate target mapping and specifying semantic object as Shell and action as bootConfig and adding the parameter that I had used before, but this worked on a global level again.

Our current SAP_UI version is 758.

 Is there a way to disable the search functionality in the FLP shell bar specifically for selected applications or catalogs, rather than globally?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Order BOM with different plant code in Sales order
entry.content:
Hi,

The shipping plant for the order is A.
The production plant is B.
I want to generate a Order BOM at plant B because there is a production BOM at plant B, which actually produces the order BOM for the orders registered at A.
The assumption is Strategy “50” both plant.

 

Best regards,

Ryoichi

entry.title: How to find data source, extractor, CDS views for time info object
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I like to know how do I find the data sources, extractors and CDS views which has any time characteristics. In other words I like to know that my time related info objects such as 0calmonth or 0calweek or 0fiscper info objects how do I know in which data sources, extractors and CDS views are using these info objects.

If I go to "where used-list" I dont see this information but only ADSO, Queries transformations etc.

I know there is a table name RSOSFIELDMAP which we can use in classic BW, t-code SE 11 to see the mapping from data sources for an object but this t-code is not working for me in BW 4/HANA.

Do I have to use Eclipse or HANA studio or can I use RSA1 in BW 4/HANA environment.

Thanks and much appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: Service procurement in sap S4/HANA
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Can anyone explain for me What is the Difference Between External Service Management and Lean Service Procurement, and How Do You Decide Which One to Use?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Print original Characteristic results in the Quality Certificate from QC20 without round-off
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a critical requirement in our process that we want to print original Characteristic Results in the Quality Certificate when we print from QC20 or QC21, without rounding off to decimals in certificate profile.

In case of different decimal points of the same MIC is used in inspection plan (and result recording accordingly) and certificate profile, system generates certificate output with rounding up/down to certificate profile decimal information.


Requirement: We need to print the exact result data, as it is entered during result recording.

Can you please tell if there is standard approach to avoid rounding off according to certificate profile (maybe using a BADi, User Exit, Enhancement Spot etc.)? Instead, we want to show the original result from result recording.

Client does not want to maintain several certificate profiles to handle decimal issue.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration of statistical projects isn't possible due to missing profit center
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Using the Migration Cockpit, we're currently migrating statistical projects from our SAP ECC system to our SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud, using the Direct Transfer approach and Migration Object "PS - Project". We've noticed one thing though: we can't migrate statistical projects that don't have a profit center associated to them. Whenever we try to do it, the Migration Cockpit throws some errors (as "empty/missing profit center").

Using transaction CJ20N though, we can create these statistical projects, with no profit centers, without any issues! Our query then is:

  • How do we avoid these errors? Shouldn't we be able to directly migrate statistical projects without profit centers using the Migration Cockpit, since the respective transaction allows such thing?

If it helps, our S/4HANA release is 2023. Thanks!

Best regards,
Data migration experts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Link btw Settlement Document (External Agent) & Source Billing document(s)
entry.content:
Dear all,
I need help cause I could not find any information about this issue: The requirement is: to print the original customer invoice informations( Invoice Nr, items, prices) in item level in the settlement document for external agent (Commission). The problem is that I cann't find any linkage between the settlment document and the source billing document(customent invoice) on which this settlement (commission for the external agent) was based. 

Does anybody know how can this problem be solved or any suggestions for a alternativ solution?

Thank you all in advane. 

Best regards 

Saida

entry.title: Error Message No. G06221 - Error while calling ANST Note Search WebService.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expertise,

I have this Chronologies:

I am running COI (consolidation of investment) task in consolidation monitor - Task 2101 CoI

Document Type 3B Auto CoI adj. (30/AUT)

Then this error message occurred:
Statistical items were generated, please repeat execution

Message No. G06221

Diagnosis

At least one statistical item was generated during the current execution
of the consolidation of investments task.

System Response

The system cannot check the document completely and therefore prevents
the posting.

All task in data monitor and all previous task that already run before this COI task in consolidation monitor is successfully run.

Please kindly need the helps.

Thank You.

Best Regards,

SAP GR Consultant

entry.title: Rental server for SAP S/4HANA Cloud version up
entry.content:
I would like to rent two sandbox servers to verify the upgrade of SAP S/4HANA Cloud for the S/4HANA upgrade project.
Is it possible to rent multiple servers as follows?
1. Rent server A for six months.
On server A, copy the system from the production system and perform the S/4HANA upgrade.
2. Rent server B for five months, starting from the month following the rental period of server A.
As with server A, copy the system from the production system and upgrade S/4HANA.

entry.title: API Integration
entry.content:
I work at a startup that provides business management solutions. One of our services includes the ability to upload JSON files, such as expense reports, from our platform to the user's accounting management system.

We have successfully implemented this functionality with platforms like QuickBooks and Xero using OAuth, and we would like to do the same with your system. However, as I understand, in your case, each client has a local instance, and interactions are conducted through the client's admin.

I would appreciate your clarification on the following points:

  1. How can we obtain an access token (via OAuth or PAT)?
  2. Where can we find your API documentation, and do you provide a sandbox environment for testing?

I would greatly appreciate a detailed response.

entry.title: Customer 00000XXXXX: Customer master table KNVV is missing.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While posting forwarding settlement document I am getting the following error "Customer 00000XXXXX: Customer master table KNVV is missing", Can anyone can let me know how to resolve this issue.

Note : The error I am getting this in Ocean freight Scenario.

Your prompt reply is highly appreciated.

Kind Regards,

PK

entry.title: Standard class has deleted CL_FS4BPU_EMPL_MINIMASTER_API
entry.content:
Class "CL_FS4BPU_EMPL_MINIMASTER_API" seems not to exist anymore on SAP S/4HANA 2023 (it previously existed in 2021 release).

  • Is there a direct replacement for this removed object?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Leap Year
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

As you know, the current year (2024) was a leap year. However, SAP has forgotten to adapt the corresponding calendars for some Calendars other than the Gregorian calendar, such as the Japanese or Solar calendars. 

As seen in the attached screenshot, the last day of the current Solar Year (30.12.1403) does not exist in the Calendar, which should be the same day as 20.03.2025, whereas the next year (1404) is falsely considered as a leap year!

 

Does anyone have an idea how to solve this problem?

Thanks and best Regards
Vahmani

entry.title: Unable to load the tile Maintenance Backlog Overview(F5105)
entry.content:
Getting error as below for the app Maintenance Backlog Overview.

  1. Cannot read properties of undefined (reading "oCrossAppNavService")

entry.title: How do I fill DMEE tag ReqdExctnDt/DtTm
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm working on getting the DMEEX for ISO20022 up for our local bank's requirement. I am also logged into the SWIFT network so I can get a direct feedback on my efforts. 

My message relates to CGI_XML_CT, I made a copy of it for local purposes and renamed it /Z_CGI_XML_CT_V9

Apparently now as part of the Required Execution Date I also need to give a Date Time stamp. In SAP this is mapped as a constant, however the source field is empty.

Feedback from SWIFT ABN Validation:

I don't see any date-time settings in FPAYH of FPAHX.

Many thanks for your input!

entry.title: How to change the billing status for an outbound delivery?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have an outbound delivery with goods movement done. But the billing status still shows A, how to complete the follow-up process? Actually I want this delivery "done".

Regards,

Eric

entry.title: SAP SAP CTRM vs. Other ETRM Systems: A Strategic Comparison
entry.content:
Commodity Trading and Risk Management (CTRM) systems are essential for businesses operating in volatile markets, such as energy and commodities. These systems enable companies to manage their trading operations, risk exposures, and financial processes effectively. This article explores a strategic comparison between SAP CTRM  and other ETRM systems, focusing on key capabilities, challenges, and business impacts.

1. Core Functionalities: A Comparative Overview

FeatureSAP Commodity Management (SAP CTRM)Other ETRM Systems

Deal Capture & PricingRequires customization for advanced deal structuresTypically offers robust out-of-the-box functionality
Risk ManagementRequires medium to high customizationSpecialized tools often provide comprehensive features
SchedulingStandard functionality available with configurationAdvanced scheduling features with built-in flexibility
Inventory ManagementIntegrated with SAP ERP, needs additional configurationDedicated inventory workbench with minimal configuration
Reporting & AnalyticsFunctional but heavily reliant on customizationRich, pre-built analytics tailored for trading operations

2. Customization Requirements

  • SAP CTRM: While SAP CTRM provides a strong foundation, achieving CTRM capabilities requires significant customization and enhancements, particularly for complex trading and risk management needs. This can extend implementation timelines and require substantial investment in development, testing, and training.

  • Other ETRM Systems: Many ETRM systems are purpose-built for commodity trading and come with advanced functionalities out of the box. This reduces customization efforts but may pose challenges in integrating with broader ERP systems.

3. Integration and Ecosystem Alignment

  • SAP CTRM: Offers seamless integration with SAP’s broader ERP ecosystem, making it a strong choice for organizations already using SAP solutions. This enables a unified platform for managing supply chain, finance, and trading operations.

  • Other ETRM Systems: While they excel in trading and risk management, integration with ERP systems often requires additional middleware or custom connectors, potentially increasing complexity.

4. Risk Management Capabilities

Managing financial exposure, market volatility, and regulatory compliance are critical for any CTRM system:

  • SAP CTRM: Requires extensive customization to achieve sophisticated risk monitoring, position management, and exposure reporting capabilities.

  • Other ETRM Systems: Typically deliver robust risk management features with real-time exposure analysis, making them ideal for fast-paced trading environments.

5. Implementation and Change Management

  • SAP CTRM: Transitioning to SAP CM involves significant change management efforts due to high levels of customization and the need to retrain teams. This is especially true when replacing a mature ETRM system.

  • Other ETRM Systems: Implementation is often quicker due to pre-built capabilities, but organizations must manage integration complexities and ensure alignment with existing business processes.

6. Key Business Considerations

AspectSAP CTRMOther ETRM Systems
Total Cost of OwnershipHigher due to customization and extended implementationModerate with quicker time-to-value
ScalabilityHigh, given its integration with the SAP ecosystemModerate, depending on the system’s integration capability
Long-Term ViabilityAligns well with SAP-centric digital transformation goalsBest suited for specialized trading environments

7. Recommendations

For organizations evaluating SAP CTRM against other ETRM systems, here are some key considerations:

  • Business Alignment: If your organization heavily relies on SAP ERP, SAP CTRM offers seamless integration and a unified platform, making it a strategic fit.

  • Functionality vs. Integration: Other ETRM systems may provide superior out-of-the-box trading functionality but could increase complexity when integrating with ERP systems.

  • Customization vs. Specialization: SAP CTRM’s need for customization must be weighed against the specialized features of other ETRM systems to determine the best fit for your business needs.

  • Long-Term Goals: For companies aiming for end-to-end digital transformation, SAP CTRM provides a scalable and sustainable solution, albeit with initial challenges.

8. Conclusion

Choosing between SAP CTRM and other ETRM systems depends on your organization’s specific needs, existing technology stack, and long-term goals. While SAP CTRM aligns well with SAP’s ecosystem, other ETRM systems excel in delivering specialized trading and risk management features. Organizations must carefully assess the trade-offs and prioritize their strategic objectives to make an informed decision.

entry.title: Difference between GR/IR control & GR/IR Indicator in Purchase Order Field selection group
entry.content:
• what is the difference between GR/IR control & GR/IR Indicator in Purchase Order Field selection group.
  • Which fields in the Purchase Order does this "GR/IR control" governs?

entry.title: TIME_OUT Error in FBL3N and FAGLL03 Transactions After Upgrade to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are encountering a recurring TIME_OUT error when executing the transactions FBL3N and FAGLL03 after upgrading our SAP system from ECC6 to S/4HANA. These transaction (FBL3N) worked correctly in our previous ECC6 environment, but they fail to execute in S/4HANA.

Details of the Issue:

  1. Transaction Name: FBL3N / FAGLL03
  2. System Version:
    • Previous: SAP ECC 6.0
    • Current: SAP S/4HANA
  3. Selection Criteria Used:
    • Date range: [e.g., 01.01.2023 to 31.12.2023]
    • Accounts: [e.g.,3*]
    • Other filters: [e.g., company code 1000].
    • Line items selection :
    • Status : All Line Items
  4. Error Details:
    • Error: TIME_OUT
    • Program: [e.g., SAPLFBL3 or SAPMF05L].

Best regards
